product_overview: A premium interactive single-page website that highlights stone sculptures with immersive 3D visuals, cinematic smooth scrolling, and a minimal gallery experience. The site focuses on visual storytelling, performance, and responsive presentation across devices.
core_goals: Deliver an immersive hero with interactive 3D sculpture to create immediate visual impact.
Provide an accessible, browsable gallery of sculptures with full-screen 3D viewing and details.
Implement Lenis-powered smooth scrolling for a cinematic, high-end navigation experience.
Optimize performance by lazy-loading heavy assets and keeping a minimal, fast UI.
Ensure mobile responsiveness and graceful fallbacks when 3D assets fail to load.

features.name: 3D Sculpture Hero
features.description: Immersive hero section on the landing page showcasing an interactive 3D sculpture with parallax and pointer-driven camera subtlety to create a cinematic introduction.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to see parallax effects -> Observe 3D sculpture rotation -> Move pointer to shift camera perspective -> See smooth floating motion and cinematic transition
Navigate to / -> Wait for 3D assets to load -> Observe prolonged loading beyond expected time -> See fallback visual and messaging indicating model could not load

features.name: Sculpture Gallery
features.description: Grid-based gallery on the landing page allowing users to browse sculpture entries, preview subtle hover effects, and open a full-screen 3D viewer with details for each piece.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through sculpture cards -> Hover over cards for effects -> Open a sculpture entry to view full-screen -> Observe 3D rotating sculpture in viewer -> Rotate the sculpture with pointer control to inspect details -> See details panel with title, location, and year

Navigate to / -> Scroll through sculpture cards -> Open a sculpture entry to view full-screen -> Observe 3D viewer failing to initialize or model failing to load -> See fallback image and contextual guidance to retry or return to gallery

features.name: Smooth Scrolling
features.description: Lenis-powered smooth scrolling that provides cinematic, inertia-based navigation and enhances parallax and 3D effects across the single-page layout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Use mouse wheel to scroll smoothly -> Observe cinematic scrolling and parallax across sections -> Land on target section with preserved scroll inertia
Navigate to / -> Use mouse wheel to scroll smoothly -> Observe abrupt or janky movement indicating scroll engine failed -> See suggestion to reload or disable smooth scrolling for improved stability

routes.description: Main landing page with 3D sculptures and smooth scrolling.

features.name: 3D Sculpture Hero
features.description: Immersive hero section with interactive 3D sculpture.
